I'm now zeroing in on the correct place to adjust the Stripe links. I've confirmed that `pack_500` in `services/stripeService.ts` corresponds to the "Pro Pack". **Adjusting Stripe URLs**

I plan to change the `pack_500` URL, which corresponds to the Pro Pack, to the updated link, 'https://buy.stripe.com/test_55B25qdpw1uB3vj145'. I'm also ensuring that no other associated package IDs are affected by this change.


**Validating Functionality**

I'm now integrating a fallback mechanism due to possible Edge Function deployment issues. I've designed the `createCheckoutSession` to use a direct payment link in case the Supabase Edge Function is unavailable. **Implementing Fallback Logic**

Com certeza. Como engenheiro sênior, atualizei o mapeamento de pagamentos no serviço do Stripe para refletir o novo link de checkout do **Pro Pack**.
